use_cases: Displaying system or service status with visual indicators in dashboards
Showing connection or health status for API endpoints or services
Presenting real-time status updates in monitoring interfaces
Indicating success or error states in operational workflows
Labeling and categorizing items with secondary descriptive text
ai_summary: A lightweight status badge component built on the Tremor design system that displays labeled status information with optional icons on both sides. Supports three status variants (success, error, default) with automatic color coding for success and error states. Commonly used in SaaS dashboards and dev tools interfaces to communicate system health, service status, or operational states with a clean, professional appearance.
